fn_def_list.fn_code:
static void print_help_info_ahost(void) {
    printf("ahost, version %s 

", ARES_VERSION_STR);
    printf("usage: ahost [-h] [-d] [-s {domain}] [-t {a|aaaa|u}] {host|addr} ...

"
    "  d : Print some extra debugging output.
"
    "  h : Display this help and exit.

"
    "  s domain : Specify the domain to search instead of 
"
    "               using the default values from 
"
    "               /etc/resolv.conf. This option only has an 
"
    "               effect on platforms that use /etc/resolv.conf
"
    "               for DNS configuration; it has no effect on other
"
    "               platforms (such as Win32 or Android).
"
    "  t type   : If type is "a", print the A record (default).
"
    "               If type is "aaaa", print the AAAA record.  If
"
    "               type is "u", look for either AAAA or A record
"
    "               (in that order).

");
    exit(0);
}
